test_cases.title: Yaw Rate Sensor Sampling Verification
test_cases.description: Verify yaw rate input is sampled at 100 Hz by checking output updates every 10 ms.
pass_criteria: YawRateError_degps updates at every simulation step (0.01 s)

test_cases.title: Yaw Rate Error Computation Accuracy
test_cases.description: Apply known steering input at constant speed and verify yaw rate error matches expected bicycle model deviation.
pass_criteria: YawRateError_degps is within +/- 0.5 deg/s of analytically computed reference error

test_cases.title: Differential Braking Activation Threshold
test_cases.description: Inject yaw rate error exceeding 4 deg/s for more than 20 ms and verify brake torque commands are issued.
pass_criteria: SCS_Active becomes true within 30 ms of yaw rate error exceeding 4 deg/s
At least one of BrakeTorque_FL/FR/RL/RR_Nm is non-zero during intervention

test_cases.title: Brake Torque Slip Ratio Limiting
test_cases.description: During stability intervention, verify no wheel exceeds 15% slip ratio.
pass_criteria: Computed slip ratio for all four wheels remains below 0.15 throughout intervention

test_cases.title: Low Speed Intervention Derating
test_cases.description: At parking speed (3 m/s ~ 11 km/h), verify the corrective yaw moment is derated to 30% of the controller output and the derating factor output reads 0.3.
pass_criteria: DeratingFactor output is 0.3 throughout the simulation
Brake torque commands are 30% of the values that would be commanded at full authority

test_cases.title: Full Authority at Moderate Speed
test_cases.description: At 30 m/s (108 km/h), verify the derating factor is 1.0 and the corrective yaw moment is passed through at full authority.
pass_criteria: DeratingFactor output is 1.0 throughout the simulation
Brake torque commands match full-authority controller output

test_cases.title: High Speed Intervention Derating (Autobahn)
test_cases.description: At 60 m/s (216 km/h), verify the corrective yaw moment is derated to 60% and the derating factor output reads 0.6.
pass_criteria: DeratingFactor output is 0.6 throughout the simulation
Brake torque commands are 60% of the values that would be commanded at full authority

_traceability_notes.REQ-SCS-004: NO TEST LINKED — Lateral acceleration limiting has no dedicated test case
_traceability_notes.REQ-SCS-006: NO TEST LINKED — Real-time execution constraint has no dedicated test case
